request.description: Create a new Stock Take Plan. The backend auto-calculates total_zones, total_bins, total_skus, estimated_items, estimated_units, and duration from the selected zones.
Get full details of a single stock take plan including coverage, approval info, team, and settings.
Update a stock take plan. Only draft or scheduled plans can be updated. Coverage stats are recalculated automatically.
Transition plan from draft → scheduled.
Start counting. Checks for warehouse conflicts. Auto-locks inventory if lockInventory=true.
Pause an in-progress stock take count.
Resume a paused stock take count.
Mark the stock take as completed. Auto-unlocks inventory. Validates all bins counted if allowPartialCounts=false.
Cancel a stock take plan. Automatically unlocks any active inventory locks.
Get bin/zone coverage breakdown for a plan: totalZones, totalBins, countedBins, remainingBins, coveragePercentage, and per-zone details.
Submit a completed plan for approval. Requires requiresApproval=true and status=completed.
Approve a submitted stock take plan. Requires stock_take.approve permission.
Reject a submitted stock take plan. Requires stock_take.approve permission.
Get current inventory lock status for a warehouse: lock details, locked by, timestamp, estimated unlock time.
Manually lock inventory for a warehouse during a stock take. Requires stock_take.lock permission.
Unlock inventory for a warehouse. Requires stock_take.lock permission.
Export all stock take plans matching filters as a flat records array (up to 10,000 rows). Requires stock_take.export permission.
Extend the plan end date/deadline. Requires stock_take.edit permission.
Reassign team counters and lead. Requires stock_take.edit permission.
Get bin level count progress for Count Progress tab. Requires stock_take.view permission.
Get variances list for Variances tab. Requires stock_take.view permission.
Get counter performance statistics for Team Performance tab. Requires stock_take.view permission.
Get action activity log for Activity Log tab. Requires stock_take.view permission.
Export count sheets for the plan. Requires stock_take.view permission.
Print count sheets for the plan. Requires stock_take.view permission.
Download plan variance report data. Requires stock_take.view permission.
